nodes.name: RSS Read
nodes.notes: "The RSS Ingestion Engine acts as an 'Always-On' trend radar, capturing viral signals from global tech and health feeds in real-time."

values.content:
"You are a Professional YouTube Automation Architect. Your sole task is to transform raw RSS news data into high-retention 60-second Reel scripts.

Your Operational Constraints:

The Hook: Generate 3 'Scroll-Stopping' hooks (one curiosity-based, one shock-based, and one value-based).

The Narrative: Write a fast-paced, high-energy script under 140 words.

The CTA: Include a creative call-to-action to maximize subscriber growth.

Tone: Engaging, authoritative, and viral-focused.

Structure: Use clear headings for Hook, Script, and CTA so the output is production-ready." "Add Message" dabayein, User select karein aur ye mapping karein:

"Generate a viral script for the following news item:
Title: {{ $node["RSS Read"].json["title"] }}
Summary: {{ $node["RSS Read"].json["contentSnippet"] }}

Ensure the script is optimized for the YouTube algorithm's retention metrics."

nodes.name: Message a model
nodes.notes: "The 'Message a Model' node serves as the 'AI Script Architect,' autonomously distilling real-time RSS data into production-ready scripts optimized for the YouTube algorithm's retention metrics.

parameters.prompt: ="A dramatic, ultra-realistic 9:16 vertical cinematic landscape illustrating the tech news: '{{ $node["RSS Read"].json["title"] }}'. Focus on a single futuristic object, like a dancing robot or AI interface, glowing with neon blue and purple lights. The background is a dark, sleek, sci-fi city with rain and fog. The style is cyberpunk-aesthetic, with high contrast, deep shadows, and an optimized aspect ratio (9:16) with no text, labels, or watermarks within the image."

parameters.subject: [Short 4-5 word catchy title]
parameters.message: [A 1-sentence summary + a confirmation that the DALL-E 3 visual is ready for the voiceless reel.]  Output ONLY the Subject and Message, no extra conversation."
